title: Eye Candy
description: This is what minecraft will look like in 2017
body:
## Welcome to Eye Candy!

This is a Minecraft Modpack for version 1.20.1 that sets out to do only one thing: Enahance the look of Vanilla Minecraft while still keeping the vanilla feel, making minecraft look more Beautiful than ever!

Obviously, beauty is pretty subjective, but thankfully, every mod can be configured! I spent some time making a preset I personally felt looked nice and ran at a smooth 60FPS on my computer, but each mod has enough customizeability that you can choose how to make your game look. Plus, with the Resourcify mod, you can download your own Resource Packs and Shaders on the go.

**Features**
- Shaders from the Iris Mod
- Extreme Render Distances from the Distant Horizons mod that are compatible with some shaders!
- Many resource packs changing the game in ways ranging from big to small, all without disrupting the vanilla feel and textures for most blocks and items.
- Animations for mobs, blocks, and players.

On its own, this is effectively Vanilla Minecraft, but if you have a PC that can run it and want your minecraft to have a bit of Pizazz, please try Eye Candy out! You are also welcome to use Eye Candy as a base for other modpacks, no credit required.
